creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of shells/zsh

diff -urN shells/zsh/pkg/DESCR.orig shells/zsh/pkg/DESCR
--- shells/zsh/pkg/DESCR.orig   Fri Jan 21 09:46:05 2000
+++ shells/zsh/pkg/DESCR        Fri Jan 21 09:46:18 2000
@@ -4,3 +4,5 @@
 command-line editor, options for customising its behaviour, filename
 globbing, features to make C-shell (csh) users feel more at home and
 extra features drawn from tcsh (another `custom' shell).
+
+WWW: http://www.zsh.org/
